channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [UGROCAP] Ugro Capital to Acquire 100% Shareholding of Datasigns Technologies in Cash-only Deal
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ugro Capital Ltd is in the process of completing the acquisition of 100% shareholding of Datasigns Technologies Private Limited (DTPL), the technology platform operating MyShubhLife. The acquisition will be made through an Amended and Restated Share Purchase Agreement dated March 5, 2026, which provides for payment of INR 38.23 crores entirely in cash in a single tranche. This is a revision from the original SPA, which provided for a combination of cash and share swap in two tranches. The revision is part of UGRO's capital allocation approach to avoid equity dilution. The MyShubhLife platform, which is a key part of UGRO’s embedded finance ecosystem, has enabled loan disbursements with an AUM of approximately INR 1,720 crores as of December 31, 2025.

  • Ugro Capital to acquire 100% shareholding of Datasigns Technologies Private Limited
  • Transaction to be completed through an Amended and Restated Share Purchase Agreement
  • Consideration revised from INR 45 crores in two tranches to INR 38.23 crores in a single cash tranche
  • MyShubhLife platform is a key part of UGRO’s embedded finance ecosystem
  • MyShubhLife platform has enabled loan disbursements with an AUM of approximately INR 1,720 crores as of December 31, 2025

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ugro Capital Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [RPOWER] Reliance Power Ltd Announces Cessation of Wholly Owned Subsidiary Reliance Chittagong Power Company Limited, Bangladesh
item.description:
Reliance Power Ltd has disclosed under Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015 that it will cease to have Reliance Chittagong Power Company Limited, Bangladesh as its wholly owned subsidiary. The subsidiary contributed 35 lakhs to the net worth of the company in the last financial year ended March 31, 2025. The voluntary winding up of the subsidiary was intimated to the company on March 05, 2026.

  • Reliance Power Ltd to cease having Reliance Chittagong Power Company Limited, Bangladesh as its wholly owned subsidiary.
  • Reliance Chittagong Power Company Limited, Bangladesh contributed 35 lakhs to the net worth of Reliance Power Ltd in the last financial year ended March 31, 2025.
  • The subsidiary is being voluntarily wound up and the information was received by Reliance Power Ltd on March 05, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RELIANCE POWER LTD. | Category: Subsidiaries

item.title: [URAVI] Uravi Defence And Technology Limited Transfers 50.01% Shareholding in SKL to Mr. Krishnakumar Bhatia and Mrs. Bhavna Bhatia
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Uravi Defence And Technology Limited has transferred 50.01% of its shareholding in SKL India (Private) Limited to Mr. Krishnakumar Bhatia, Managing Director of SKL, and Mrs. Bhavna Bhatia, Director of SKL. This decision was approved at the Extra-Ordinary General Meeting held on March 02, 2026. As a result of this transaction, Mr. Niraj Gada, Promoter and Director of SKL, and Mr. Niken Shah, Independent Director of SKL, have resigned from the Board of SKL with effect from the same date. Consequent to this, SKL India Private Limited has ceased to be a subsidiary of the Company.

  • Uravi Defence And Technology Limited transfers 50.01% shareholding in SKL to Mr. Krishnakumar Bhatia and Mrs. Bhavna Bhatia
  • Mr. Niraj Gada and Mr. Niken Shah resign from the Board of SKL
  • SKL India Private Limited ceases to be a subsidiary of Uravi Defence And Technology Limited

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Uravi T And Wedge Lamps Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [CONFINT] Longspur International Ventures Ltd. to Consider Funds Raising Through Equity Shares Issuance on March 10, 2026
item.description:
Longspur International Ventures Ltd. has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on March 10, 2026, to consider various businesses, including the proposal to raise funds through the issuance of Equity Shares or warrants by way of Preferential Allotment or any other method. The meeting will also involve fixing the day, date, time, and venue of the meeting and approving the draft notice for raising funds. The trading window for dealing in securities of the Company will be closed from Thursday, March 5, 2026, till the expiry of 48 hours after the declaration of the meeting's outcome.

  • Longspur International Ventures Ltd. to consider raising funds through Equity Shares issuance on March 10, 2026
  • The meeting will discuss fixing the day, date, time, and venue of the meeting and approving the draft notice for raising funds
  • Trading window for dealing in securities of the Company will be closed from March 5, 2026, till the expiry of 48 hours after the meeting's outcome

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Confidence Finance And Trading Limited | Category: Investment

item.title: [GOACARBON] Goa Carbon Ltd: General Manager (Operations) Resigns for Better Career Prospects
item.description:
Goa Carbon Limited has informed the Exchange about the resignation of its General Manager (Operations), Mr. A. Venugopala Naidu. Mr. Naidu has resigned for better career prospects and his resignation has been accepted by the Management. His last working day will be 20 May 2026 or such other date as may be mutually agreed. The details of the event are provided as per Regulation 30 and Schedule IIl of the Listing Regulations.

  • Mr. A. Venugopala Naidu, General Manager (Operations), has resigned for better career prospects.
  • His resignation has been accepted by the Management of Goa Carbon Limited.
  • His last working day will be 20 May 2026 or such other date as may be mutually agreed.
  • The details of the event are provided as per Regulation 30 and Schedule IIl of the Listing Regulations.
  • Mr. Naidu has expressed gratitude to the management and leadership for the trust, support, and opportunities provided to him during his tenure.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GOA CARBON LTD.-$ | Category: Management Change

item.title: [CYIENT] Cyient Ltd Trading Window Reopens After Closure
item.description:
Cyient Ltd has announced the reopening of its trading window for dealing in the company's securities. The window, which was closed with effect from 26 February 2026, will now be operational from Friday, 6 March 2026. This information is for record purposes.

  • Cyient Ltd's trading window has been reopened after a closure
  • The reopening is effective from 6 March 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cyient Limited | Category: Business Update

item.title: [FRACTAL] Fractal Analytics Crosses Rs 100 Cr PAT in Q3, Revenue Grows 21% YoY
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Fractal Analytics Ltd, a global enterprise AI company, announced its consolidated financial results for Q3 FY 2026, ending December 31, 2025. The company reported consolidated revenue of Rs 854.4 Cr, a growth of 21% year on year (YoY). The Healthcare and Life Sciences segment grew 78% YoY and the Banking and Financial Services segment grew 26% YoY. Fractal further expanded its relationships with existing clients, resulting in a Net Revenue Retention of 114% in Q3 FY26. The company reported a Gross Margin of 47.2% and Adjusted EBITDA of Rs 152.1 Cr, with an Adjusted EBITDA margin of 17.8%. Profit after Tax was Rs 100.1 Cr. Fractal's consumer-targeted AI-based health assistant, Vaidya.ai 2.0, became the first AI model to achieve a 50+ score on OpenAl's HealthBench (Hard).

  • Revenue grows 21% YoY to Rs 854.4 Cr
  • Healthcare and Life Sciences segment grows 78% YoY
  • Banking and Financial Services segment grows 26% YoY
  • Net Revenue Retention of 114% in Q3 FY26
  • Gross Margin of 47.2% and Adjusted EBITDA of Rs 152.1 Cr
  • Fractal's Vaidya.ai 2.0 becomes the first AI model to achieve a 50+ score on OpenAl's HealthBench (Hard)

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FRACTAL | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [GALACTICO] Galactico Corporate Services Ltd Adjourns Board Meeting for Further Deliberations
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Galactico Corporate Services Ltd convened a meeting on March 05, 2026, at the deemed Registered Office of the Company through Video conferencing/OAVM. The meeting was adjourned to enable further deliberations on certain agenda items and will reconvene tomorrow to consider and conclude these items. The outcome of the adjourned meeting will be intimated to the Stock Exchange upon conclusion, in accordance with the applicable provisions of the Companies Act 2013 and the SEBI Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements Regulations.

  • Galactico Corporate Services Ltd board meeting was held on March 05, 2026
  • The meeting was conducted through Video conferencing/OAVM
  • The meeting was adjourned for further deliberations on certain agenda items
  • The adjourned meeting will reconvene tomorrow
  • The outcome of the adjourned meeting will be shared with the Stock Exchange as per regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Galactico Corporate Services Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [LUMAXTECH] Lumax Auto Technologies Appoints New Senior Vice President & Chief Human Resource Officer
item.description:
Lumax Auto Technologies Limited has appointed Ms. Pooja Minocha as the Senior Vice President & Chief Human Resource Officer (CHRO) designated as Senior Management Personnel with effect from March 05, 2026. Ms. Minocha is a Commerce Graduate and holds a Master’s Degree in Business Administration (HR) from Institute of Technology & Management (ITM), Mumbai. She has over 22 years of global experience in the Human Resources function and brings in deep expertise in HR and OD strategies, executive compensation and talent development. Mr. Suresh Kumar Dwivedi, who was previously nominated as Senior Management Personnel, will cease to be considered as such and will continue to act as Assistant Vice President - IR & Admin of the Company.

  • Ms. Pooja Minocha appointed as Senior Vice President & Chief Human Resource Officer (CHRO) of Lumax Auto Technologies Limited.
  • Ms. Minocha is a Commerce Graduate and holds a Master’s Degree in Business Administration (HR) from Institute of Technology & Management (ITM), Mumbai.
  • Ms. Minocha has over 22 years of global experience in the Human Resources function.
  • Mr. Suresh Kumar Dwivedi ceases to be Senior Management Personnel and continues as Assistant Vice President - IR & Admin.
  • Appointment is effective from March 05, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LUMAX AUTO TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [LUMAXTECH] Lumax Auto Technologies Appoints Ms. Pooja Minocha as SVP & CHRO
item.description:
Lumax Auto Technologies Ltd has appointed Ms. Pooja Minocha as the Senior Vice President & Chief Human Resource Officer (CHRO) designated as Senior Management Personnel with effect from March 05, 2026. Ms. Minocha is a Commerce Graduate and holds a Master’s Degree in Business Administration (HR) from Institute of Technology & Management (ITM), Mumbai. She has over 22 years of global experience in the Human Resources function and brings in deep expertise in HR and OD strategies, executive compensation and talent development. Mr. Suresh Kumar Dwivedi, who is presently nominated as Senior Management Personnel, will cease to be considered as the Senior Management Personnel with effect from March 05, 2026, however he will continue to act as Assistant Vice President - IR & Admin of the Company.

  • Ms. Pooja Minocha appointed as SVP & CHRO of Lumax Auto Technologies
  • Ms. Minocha is a Commerce Graduate with a Master’s Degree in Business Administration (HR) from ITM, Mumbai
  • Ms. Minocha has over 22 years of global experience in Human Resources
  • Mr. Suresh Kumar Dwivedi to cease being Senior Management Personnel
  • Mr. Dwivedi to continue as Assistant Vice President - IR & Admin of the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LUMAX AUTO TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Management Change
